basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Advisor (Finance & Audit) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website iitgoa.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Goa Advisor (Finance & Audit) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university
qualification.details: Advisor (Finance & Audit): Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university. Employees retired at least on a post with a Pay Level-10 (7th CPC) or equivalent from Central Government/ Central Autonomous Bodies/ PSU who have excellent service records and physically fit, out of which at least 5 years' experience in a supervisory position and should have handled Finance/ Audit/ Accounts matters in Central government/ Central Autonomous Bodies/ PSU. Adequate knowledge of Central Govt. Rules & Regulations relating to Accounts, GFR, Audit, Budgeting, Finance, etc. and should have good noting and drafting skills and be able to work on computers. Knowledge of working in Tally software/PFMS/ERP and payroll systems.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Goa Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Goa Advisor (Finance & Audit) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Goa Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Advisor (Finance & Audit): Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university. Employees retired at least on a post with a Pay Level-10 (7th CPC) or equivalent from Central Government/ Central Autonomous Bodies/ PSU who have excellent service records and physically fit, out of which at least 5 years' experience in a supervisory position and should have handled Finance/ Audit/ Accounts matters in Central government/ Central Autonomous Bodies/ PSU. Adequate knowledge of Central Govt. Rules & Regulations relating to Accounts, GFR, Audit, Budgeting, Finance, etc. and should have good noting and drafting skills and be able to work on computers. Knowledge of working in Tally software/PFMS/ERP and payroll systems.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Goa to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Goa Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Goa Advisor (Finance & Audit) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Goa Advisor (Finance & Audit) recruitment is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) post at IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university, along with specific experience for retired government employees.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Advisor (Finance & Audit) post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Goa located?
faq.answer: IIT Goa is located in Ponda, Goa, with the pincode 403401.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for retired employees applying for this post?
faq.answer: Retired employees need at least 5 years of experience in a supervisory position handling Finance/Audit/Accounts matters in Central Government/PSUs, with a Pay Level-10 or equivalent.
